name: ExtensionRequirements_Description
title: R5: Natural language description of the requirements (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Requirements.description` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Requirements.description` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Requirements.description` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Requirements.description` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Requirements` is not mapped.
Element `Requirements.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Natural language description of the requirements (new)
element.comment:
Element `Requirements.description` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Requirements` is not mapped.
Element `Requirements.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This description can be used for a general description of the requirements, and which covers why it was defined.

element.short: Natural language description of the requirements
element.definition: A free text natural language description of the requirements.
element.comment: This description can be used for a general description of the requirements, and which covers why it was defined.
